---
title: "High-Dimensional Statistics: Inference in the p > n Regime"
subtitle: "BIO-006 | Track A — Biostatistics"
description: "When the number of variables exceeds the number of observations — genomics, imaging, electronic health records — classical statistics breaks down. This course covers the theory and methods for valid inference in high dimensions."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# High-Dimensional Statistics: Inference in the p > n Regime

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
